description: Recto: excerpts of Arabic poetry, transcribed into Judaeo-Arabic. The poem beginning in line 6 is credited to Qays b. al-Mulawwah (Majnun Layla) in some anthologies. Verso: extremely faded Hebrew in large letters. Needs further examination. ASE.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בArabic, Hebrew. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
